◎简　　介  

　　Gilmore Girls is an American comedy-drama series created by Amy Sherman-Palladino,  www. aiyoutv.com starring Lauren Graham and Alexis Bledel. On October 5, 2000, the series debuted on the WB to widespread critical acclaim [1] and remained a tent-pole to the WB until it was canceled in its seventh season, ending on May 15, 2007 on the CW.[2] The entire series has been released ...
